statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // "0"'); tin=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); tout=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); cost=$(echo "scale=3; ($tin * 15 + $tout * 75) / 1000000" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo "0.000"); branch=$(cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null && git --no-optional-locks rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); output="$model"; [ "$used" != "0" ] && [ -n "$used" ] && output="$output | ctx: $(printf '%.0f' $used)%"; [ -n "$branch" ] && output="$output | $branch"; output="$output | \$$cost"; echo "$output"
